THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRIGER, EUGENIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 655 SUTTER ST. LOWER LEVEL ART STUDIOS A, B & E, S.F. $1,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED TILL 5/31/98 IF DEFT PAYS $500- PER MONTH RENT STARTING 1/1/98. DEFT TO OBTAIN PREMISES LIABILITY INSURANCE NOT EXCEEDING $1000- PER YEAR. IF DEFT DEFAULTS PLTF TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT. DEFT TO HAVE NO PETS UNLESS BY DR'S ORDERS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
